A tutorial for creating a basic blog application with Flask, including user registration and post management.

# Purpose
The document is a tutorial guide for creating a basic blog application named Flaskr using the Flask web framework. It provides a structured walkthrough for users to build features such as user registration, login, post creation, and post management. The tutorial assumes familiarity with Python and suggests the official Python tutorial for those needing a refresher. It emphasizes a structured project layout to help new developers avoid common mistakes and to facilitate future expansion. The tutorial also includes images to illustrate the application's interface and provides links to additional resources and the example project in the Flask repository for reference.
